grader_was_author_bias_note: Substrate-vs-substrate comparison axis is LESS bias-vulnerable than absolute grade levels (same-bias subtraction reduces noise on the difference) but NOT bias-immune: confirmation-of-improvement bias inflates the grader's willingness to credit specific improvements they themselves engineered. External GPT/lain audit may dock SI 5→4 if they prefer the strict read.
